title: Terms of Use
intro: These Terms of Use govern the rules for using the Nasun service operated by the Nasun Project Team (Nasun Foundation to be incorporated). Nasun services are provided at https://nasun.io. Users must comply with the rules, understand the risks of blockchain technology, and respect copyrights.

1.title: 1. Definitions
1.description: Defines key terms used in these Terms.

terms.Service: Service: Related services provided by Nasun including Shooter Games, Open World Games, NFT Art, NFT Marketplace, Metaverse, DeFi, DAO, etc.
terms.NFT: NFT(Non-Fungible Token): A unique digital asset representing ownership of a specific item or piece of content on the blockchain.
terms.User: User: An individual or entity using the services.
terms.Content: Content: All data, text, images, videos, etc. created or posted by Nasun and users.
terms.ApplicableLaw: ApplicableLaw: Any law, rule, statute, subordinate legislation, regulation, by-law order, ordinance, protocol, code, guideline, treaty, policy, notice, direction or judicial, arbitral, administrative, ministerial or departmental judgment, award, decree, treaty, directive, or other requirement or guideline published or in force at any time which applies to or is otherwise intended to govern or regulate any person (including all parties to this Terms), property, transaction, activity, event or other matter, including any rule, order, judgment, directive or other requirement or guideline issued by any governmental or regulatory authority
terms.SaleItem: Sale Item: Sale Item means any one or more of the following without limitation: (a) any art (including without limitation, designs, drawings, prints, images in any form or media, including without limitation videos and photographs); (b) audio files; (c) collectibles; (d) memorabilia; (e) game assets.

2.title: 2. Scope of Services
2.description: Our services include Shooter Games, Open World Games, NFT Art, NFT Marketplace, Metaverse, DeFi, and DAO. Some services require blockchain integration, while others do not.

3.title: 3. Consent to Terms and Changes
3.description:
By clicking the “Sign Up” button, completing the account registration process, and using the Nasun website, you confirm that you understand and agree to these terms and conditions, together with any documents that may be expressly referred to and are incorporated by reference (“Terms”). These Terms constitute a legal agreement between you and Nasun and govern your access to and use of the Nasun services, including any content, functionality, and services offered on or through the Nasun website. 
 Nasun reserves the right to update, amend, or modify these Terms at any time, at our sole discretion. Any such changes will be posted on the Site and will take effect immediately unless otherwise stated. You are responsible for regularly reviewing the Site to stay informed of any updates. Continued use of the Nasun website or services after changes have taken effect constitutes your acceptance of the revised Terms and the updated Site. If you do not agree to the amended Terms, you must stop using the Nasun website and services immediately. 
 Nasun currently provides NFT minting and sales services. Other services (Shooter Games, Open World Games, NFT Marketplace, Metaverse, DeFi, DAO, etc.) are planned for future launch. Separate terms of use may be added or these Terms updated when those services launch, with prior notice. 
 Unless otherwise stated, these Terms and any rights, obligations, and licenses granted herein are limited, revocable, non-exclusive, and personal to you. You may not transfer, assign, or delegate them to any third party without Nasun’s prior written consent. Nasun may freely transfer, assign, or delegate these Terms and associated rights and obligations without notice or restriction, including to any entity within the Nasun group or to any successor in interest of any business related to the Nasun platform. Any attempted transfer or assignment in violation of this clause shall be null and void.

4.title: 4. Eligiblity
4.description: Nasun has sole and absolute discretion to allow or disallow your access to the Nasun website. By agreeing to these Terms, you represent and warrant that:

list.i: (i) You are at least 18 years of age;
list.ii: (ii) You have the full right, power, and authority to agree to these Terms;
list.iii: (iii) You are not subject to any financial sanctions, embargoes or other restrictive measures imposed by the United Nations, European Union, any EU country, UK Treasury or US Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC), or any governmental authority in any jurisdiction in which the Nasun website is available;
list.iv: (iv) You are not a citizen or resident of any of the following countries: Belarus, Central African Republic, Cote d’Ivoire (Ivory Coast), Cuba, Democratic Republic of the Congo, Iran, Iraq, Lebanon, Liberia, Libya, Myanmar (Burma), North Korea, Somalia, Sudan, Syria, Zimbabwe.
list.v: (v) You are not impersonating any other person;
list.vi: (vi) You will not use the Nasun website if any Applicable Laws in your country prohibit you from doing so in accordance with these Terms;
list.vii:
(vii) You are compliant with all Applicable Laws to which you are subject; 
 (viii) You have read, understood and agreed to our Privacy Notice and Cookie Policy.

5.title: 5. Account Creation, Security, and Wallet Management
5.description:
To access and use the Nasun website, users must create an account. During account creation, users are required to provide accurate and up-to-date information, and Nasun may, at its sole discretion, request additional information or documentation at any time. Nasun reserves the right to refuse, restrict, suspend, or disable access to the platform or any account at its sole discretion. 
 Users are solely responsible for maintaining the security of their accounts and connected wallets, including safeguarding passwords, private keys, and recovery phrases. All activities conducted through a user’s account or wallet are the responsibility of the account holder, regardless of who performs them.

6.title: 6. Changes to the Nasun Services
6.description: We may in our absolute and sole discretion change, update, amend, remove, or discontinue any part of the website, the services and the Content at any time without prior notice to you.

7.title: 7. Use of the Nasun Website and User Conduct
7.description: Nasun grants you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, and revocable license to access and use the Nasun website and its content, subject to compliance with these Terms and all applicable laws. By using the platform, you agree not to engage in, authorize, or assist others in any of the following prohibited activities:

list.i: (i) Violating any applicable laws, regulations, or third-party rights, including engaging in illegal, unauthorized, or unethical activities such as fraud, money laundering, or terrorism financing.
list.ii: (ii) Providing false, inaccurate, incomplete, or misleading information to Nasun, its affiliates, or service providers.
list.iii: (iii) Transmitting, uploading, or distributing any content or code that is harmful, malicious, illegal, offensive, or disruptive, including viruses, malware, or phishing attempts.
list.iv: (iv) Attempting to gain unauthorized access to the platform, its systems, other users’ accounts or wallets, or any restricted areas of the infrastructure.
list.v: (v) Interfering with, disrupting, or placing an unreasonable load on the platform, servers, networks, or other technical infrastructure, or attempting to intercept or expropriate data from other users.
list.vi: (vi) Modifying, adapting, copying, or incorporating any part of the Nasun platform into other software or applications without prior authorization.
list.vii: (vii) Reverse-engineering, decompiling, or attempting to derive the source code, structure, or algorithms of the platform.
list.viii: (viii) Infringing upon the intellectual property rights of Nasun, its affiliates, or any third party, including copyrights, trademarks, or patents.
list.ix: (ix) Engaging in spamming, unauthorized advertising, or distributing promotional materials without Nasun's consent.
list.x: (x) Participating in lotteries, bidding fee auctions, contests, sweepstakes, or other games of chance using the platform.
list.xi: (xi) Engaging in or promoting fraudulent investment schemes, Ponzi schemes, or any activity that misrepresents NFTs or platform rewards as investment opportunities, securities, or financial products that guarantee returns.

8.title: 8. Payment and Fees
8.description: We support various payment methods including blockchain transactions and traditional payments. Fees will be disclosed before transactions. Any rewards, points, or benefits distributed through the Nasun platform are for community engagement and platform participation purposes only. These are non-financial benefits and do not constitute monetary compensation, investment returns, or profit distribution. Rewards have no guaranteed monetary value and cannot be considered as financial products or investment instruments.

9.title: 9. Intellectual Property and Content License
9.description: All copyrights and intellectual property rights for content within the service belong to Nasun or legitimate rights holders. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate any Account that has actually or allegedly infringed upon any person's intellectual property rights.

license.nonCommercialUse: Non-Commercial Use: Users may copy, distribute, modify, and create derivative works of Nasun's content for personal, non-commercial purposes only, provided that: (i) Proper attribution to Nasun is maintained; (ii) Such use does not compete with or substitute for Nasun's services; (iii) If Nasun determines, in its sole discretion, that any modified content or derivative work harms or may harm Nasun's brand, reputation, or interests, Nasun may request the creator to remove or cease distribution of such content. The creator must comply with Nasun's removal request within a reasonable timeframe as specified by Nasun; (iv) The original IP and brand image of Nasun must not be intentionally damaged or defamed.
license.commercialUse: Commercial Use: A separate license agreement must be made for commercial use of Nasun's content.

9.digitalAssets: Digital Assets: Ownership of NFTs grants limited usage rights within the specified scope as outlined in Section 10. Intellectual property rights for games, animations, TV shows, and art belong to Nasun unless otherwise specified in a separate written agreement.

10.title: 10. Ownership of Your NFT
10.description:
Apart from the Content, all other copyrights, trademarks, product names, and logos on the website relating to and including the NFTs and User Content, are the property of their respective owners and may not be copied, imitated, or used, in whole or in part, without the permission of the applicable intellectual property right owner. 
 When you buy an NFT on the Nasun website, you own the NFT and have the right to sell or give away the NFT. If the NFT is associated with a Sale Item, you will have a worldwide, perpetual, non-exclusive, transferable, licence to use, copy, and display the Sale Item for your NFT, for so long as you own the NFT, solely for the following purposes:

list.i: (i) for your own personal, non-commercial use;
list.ii: (ii) as part of the Nasun website that permits the purchase, sale and display of your NFT;
list.iii: (iii) as part of a third party website or application that permits the inclusion, involvement, storage, or participation of your NFT.

10.description2: Without limiting the foregoing, if you believe that third-party material hosted by the Nasun website infringes your copyright or trademark rights, please file a notice of infringement by contacting: admin@nasun.io.

11.title: 11. Data Protection and Privacy
11.description:
By using the Nasun website, you confirm that you have read and understood our Privacy Policy and understand how we collect, use, disclose and share amongst ourselves your Personal Data and disclose such Personal Data to our authorised service providers and relevant third parties. We will only share your Personal Data in order to facilitate and administer your use of the Nasun website or otherwise if required by law. Such data controllers will manage and protect your personal data in accordance with all applicable data protection laws. For full and comprehensive information about when and why we collect personal information about you, how we use it, the conditions under which we may disclose it and how we keep it secure, please refer to our Privacy Policy. 
 We reserve the right at any time to satisfy our internal requirement as to your Personal Data (for example, by requesting relevant original documents) including for the purposes of preventing fraud and/or anti-money laundering and counter-terrorist financing purposes.

12.title: 12. Limitation of Services / Account Closure / Termination
12.description: We reserve the right, without notice and in our sole discretion, to terminate or suspend your access to or use of the Nasun website and any Content and/or close your Account, at any time for any reason but in particular, if we suspect in our sole discretion that

list.i: (i) your Account is being used for illegal activity;
list.ii: (ii) you have concealed or provided false information;
list.iii: (iii) you have engaged in fraudulent activity; and/or
list.iv: (iv) you have engaged in activity in violation of these Terms.

12.description2: If Nasun is holding funds in your Account and has no record of your use of the Nasun website for several years, we may be required, upon passage of applicable time periods, to report these funds as unclaimed property in accordance with the abandoned property and escheat laws. If this occurs, we will use reasonable efforts to give you written notice. If you fail to respond within seven business days or the period as required by Applicable Law, we may be required to deliver any such funds to the applicable jurisdiction as unclaimed property. We reserve the right to deduct a reasonable administrative fee from such unclaimed funds, as permitted by Applicable Law.

13.title: 13. Risk Disclosure
13.description: Blockchain involves risks such as price volatility, irreversible transactions, and technical errors. Nasun is not liable for damages related to service use to the fullest extent permitted by law. You understand and agree that your access to and use of the Nasun website involves certain risks, including but not limited to:

list.i: (i) The price and liquidity of blockchain assets, including NFTs, are highly volatile and subject to significant fluctuations.
list.ii: (ii) Changes in the value of other digital assets may materially and adversely affect the value of NFTs.
list.iii: (iii) Legislative and regulatory developments may negatively impact the use, transfer, or value of NFTs.
list.iv: (iv) NFTs are not legal tender and are not backed by any government authority.
list.v: (v) Transactions involving NFTs may be irreversible, and losses resulting from fraudulent or accidental transactions may not be recoverable.
list.vi: (vi) The value of NFTs may depend on the continued willingness of market participants to exchange fiat currency or digital assets for NFTs. If the market for NFTs disappears, NFTs may lose their value entirely or permanently.
list.vii: (vii) NFTs are subject to risks including fraud, counterfeiting, cyber-attacks, and other technological issues that may hinder access to or use of your NFTs.
list.viii: (viii) Nasun reserves the right, at its sole discretion, to update, modify, or enhance any NFT's visual appearance, metadata, or functionality for technical, security, or service improvement purposes. Such modifications shall not affect the core ownership rights granted under Section 10, and reasonable efforts will be made to notify NFT holders of significant changes in advance.
list.ix: (ix) You acknowledge and agree that you are solely responsible for assessing the nature, potential value, suitability, and relevance of these risks for yourself.
list.x: (x) Nasun does not provide any investment advice or recommendations regarding NFTs.
list.xi: (xi) You access and use the Nasun website entirely at your own risk.
list.xii: (xii) You further understand and agree that Nasun shall not be liable for any communication failures, disruptions, errors, or distortions you may experience when using NFTs or the Nasun website.
list.xiii: (xiii) NFTs sold or distributed through the Nasun platform are digital collectibles and creative works intended for personal use, entertainment, and community participation. They are NOT investment products, securities, or financial instruments of any kind. NFTs do not represent ownership stakes, profit-sharing rights, or any form of investment contract in Nasun Foundation or its affiliated entities. You should not purchase NFTs with the expectation of financial return or profit.

14.title: 14. Taxes
14.description: You agree that you are solely responsible for determining what, if any, taxes apply to your NFT transactions on the Nasun website or Nasun Network. Neither Nasun website nor any other Nasun Party is responsible for determining the taxes that may apply to your NFT transactions.

15.title: 15. Disclimers
15.description:
Creators may promote their respective User Content, including without limitation their Sale Items, through various communication channels such as social media accounts. Nasun is not responsible for any such communications or promotional activities carried out by the Creators and shall not be liable to you in connection with any such communications or promotions. 
 You bear full responsibility for verifying the identity, legitimacy, and authenticity of any assets you purchase on the Nasun website. Regardless of any indicators or messages suggesting verification, Nasun makes no representations or warranties regarding the identity, legitimacy, or authenticity of assets listed on the NFT marketplace. 
 The website, its content, and the NFTs listed therein are provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis, without warranties or conditions of any kind, either express or implied. Nasun (and its suppliers) makes no warranty that the Site will:

list.ii: (ii) Be available without interruption, in a timely, secure, or error-free manner;
list.iii: (iii) Be accurate, reliable, complete, legal, or safe.

15.description2:
Nasun shall not be liable for any loss of any kind resulting from actions taken or decisions made in reliance on material or information contained on the Site. Nasun does not guarantee that any content on the webite is accurate, complete, reliable, current, or free of errors. 
 While Nasun strives to make your access to and use of the website and its content secure, Nasun does not represent or warrant that the webite, its content, any NFTs listed, or any part of the website is free of viruses or other harmful components. 
 We cannot guarantee the security of any data you disclose online. You acknowledge and accept the inherent security risks of providing information and conducting transactions over the Internet. Nasun will not be responsible for any breach of security unless caused by its gross negligence. Nasun shall not be responsible or liable to you for any loss related to the use of NFTs, including but not limited to:

list2.i: (i) User errors such as forgotten passwords, incorrect transactions, or mistyped wallet addresses;

15.description3: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Nasun disclaims all warranties of any kind, whether express, implied, statutory, or otherwise, including but not limited to warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, title, and non-infringement with respect to the website and its content. This disclaimer does not affect any warranties that cannot be excluded or limited under applicable law.

16.title: 16. Limitation of Liability
16.description: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Nasun shall not be liable to you or any third party for any lost profits or any indirect, consequential, exemplary, incidental, special, or punitive damages arising from these Terms, the Site, products, or third-party sites and products. This includes, without limitation, damages related to:

list.iii: (iii) Loss of business or anticipated savings

16.description2:
Such damages may arise from tort (including negligence), breach of contract, or any other cause, even if foreseeable and even if Nasun has been advised of the possibility of such damages. Your access to and use of the website, products, or third-party sites and products is entirely at your own discretion and risk, and you are solely responsible for any damage to your computer system or loss of data resulting from such use. 
 In no event shall the maximum aggregate liability of Nasun arising out of or related to these Terms, your access to or use of the website, content, NFTs, or any products or services purchased on the website exceed the greater of: 
 (a) US$1,000, or 
 (b) the total amount of fees paid by you to Nasun in the twelve (12) months immediately preceding the event giving rise to the claim. 
 This limitation of liability shall not apply to: 
 - Damages arising from Nasun's gross negligence or willful misconduct 
 - Liability that cannot be excluded under applicable law 
 - Personal injury or death caused by Nasun's negligence

17.title: 17. Indemnification
17.description:
To the fullest extent permitted by Applicable Law, you agree to indemnify, defend and hold harmless Nasun and our past, present and future employees, officers, directors, contractors, consultants, equity holders, suppliers, vendors, service providers, parent companies, subsidiaries, affiliates, agents, representatives, predecessors, successors and assigns (individually and collectively the “Nasun Parties”), from and against all actual or alleged third party claims, damages, awards, judgments, losses, liabilities, obligations, penalties, interest, fees, expenses (including, without limitation, court costs, costs of settlement and costs of pursuing indemnification and insurance), of every kind and nature whatsoever, whether known or unknown, foreseen or unforeseen, matured or unmatured, or suspected or unsuspected, in law or equity, whether in tort, contract or otherwise (collectively, “Claims”), including, but not limited to, damages to property or personal injury, that are caused by, arise out of or are related to: 
 (a) your use or misuse of the Site, Content or NFTs, 
 (b) your breach of these Terms, and 
 (c) your breach or violation of the rights of a third party, including another user or third party service provider. 
 You agree to promptly notify Nasun of any third party Claims and cooperate with the Nasun Parties in defending such Claims. You further agree that the Nasun Parties shall have control of the defense or settlement of any third party Claims. This indemnity is in addition to, and not in lieu of, any other indemnities that may be set forth in a written agreement between you and Nasun.

18.title: 18. Transfer, Assignment or Delegation
18.description: Unless otherwise stated herein, these Terms, and any rights and obligations and licenses granted hereunder, are limited, revocable, non-exclusive and personal to you and therefore may not be transferred, assigned or delegated by you to any third-party without our written consent, but may be transferred, assigned or delegated by us without notice and restriction, including without limitation to any of the entities within the Nasun group, or to any successor in interest of any business associated with the Nasun platform. Any attempted transfer or assignment in violation hereof shall be null and void.

19.title: 19. Severability
19.description: If any provision of these Terms shall be found by any court or administrative body of competent jurisdiction to be invalid or unenforceable, the invalidity or unenforceability of such provision shall not affect the other provisions of these Terms and all provisions not affected by such invalidity or unenforceability shall remain in full force and effect. Such provision will be changed and interpreted to accomplish the objectives of the provision to the greatest extent possible under any Applicable Laws.

20.title: 20. Entire Agreement / Translation
20.description:
These Terms constitute the entire agreement between the parties with respect to the subject matter hereof and supersede and invalidate all prior representations, arrangements, understandings, and agreements relating to the same subject matter (whether oral or written, express or implied). 
 Each party acknowledges that, in agreeing to these Terms, it does not rely on any statement, representation, warranty, or understanding other than those expressly set out herein.
20.translation:
These Terms are concluded in the English language, and all communications, including notices and information, shall be conducted in English. 
 These Terms may be translated into other languages for convenience. However, in the event of any dispute or inconsistency between the translated version and the English version, the English version shall prevail and be deemed the authoritative text.
20.investmentDisclaimer: IMPORTANT INVESTMENT DISCLAIMER: The relationship between you and Nasun Foundation is NOT an investment relationship. NFTs, rewards, and any digital assets distributed through the Nasun platform are NOT investment products and do not represent securities, profit-sharing arrangements, or any form of financial instrument. You acknowledge that: (i) you are not making an investment in Nasun Foundation or any of its affiliates; (ii) you have no expectation of profits from the efforts of Nasun Foundation or others; (iii) your purchase or acquisition of NFTs or participation in platform activities does not create any equity interest, ownership stake, or profit-sharing right; (iv) the platform is designed for entertainment, community participation, and creative expression purposes only.

21.title: 21. Waiver
21.description: These Terms shall not be waived in whole or in part except where agreed by the parties in writing. The delay of enforcement or the non-enforcement of any of the terms of these Terms by any party shall not be construed as a waiver of any of the other rights of that party arising out of the breach or any subsequent breach of any of these Terms. No right, power or remedy conferred upon or reserved for any party in these Terms is exclusive of any other right, power or remedy available to that party, and each such right, power or remedy shall be cumulative.

22.title: 22. Notices and Communications
22.description: By using the Nasun website, you agree that we may provide you with notices or other communications, including marketing, relating to your use of the Nasun website electronically: (a) via email (to the address you provide), SMS message, or telephone call (to the phone number you provide), or (b) by posting to the website. For notices made by email, the date of receipt will be deemed the date on which such notice is transmitted. You will always be given the option to unsubscribe from receiving any marketing material from us.
22.contact: Notices to us should be sent electronically to admin@nasun.io.

23.title: 23. Third Party Rights
23.description: Other than the entities within the Nasun group, a person who is not a party to these Terms has no right to enforce any of these Terms.

24.title: 24. Governing Law and Jurisdiction
24.description: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the British Virgin Islands, without regard to any choice or conflict of laws rules. Any dispute, controversy, or claim (whether contractual or non-contractual) arising out of or in connection with these Terms, including any breach, termination, or invalidity thereof, shall be referred to and finally settled by arbitration administered by the British Virgin Islands International Arbitration Centre (BVI IAC) under the rules in force at the time the Notice of Arbitration is submitted.The governing law of this arbitration clause shall be the laws of the British Virgin Islands. The seat of arbitration shall be the British Virgin Islands.The number of arbitrators shall be one, and the arbitration proceedings shall be conducted in the English language.
